---
title: Hodge Podge of ML
---

## Tensor 张量

{{< include _tensor.qmd >}}

## Layers in NN

{{< include _layers.qmd >}}

## Diffusion Models

{{< include _diffusion.qmd >}}

## Autograd 机制

{{< include _autograd.qmd >}}

## Fine-tuning 微调

{{< include _ft.qmd >}}

## YOLO

{{< include _yolo.qmd >}}

## Temperary Content

> Don't know where to put them by far.

{{< include _temp.qmd >}}


## References
